title: CNBC Daily Open: Hat trick of tech IPOs complete with OpenAI filing
summary_full: OpenAI confidentially files for IPO, adding to a blockbuster tech line-up as the AI giant joins Anthropic and SpaceX in going to market.
summary_public: OpenAI confidentially files for IPO, adding to a blockbuster tech line-up as the AI giant joins Anthropic and SpaceX in going to market.
